notes.title: My Note
bullets: Private university located in Kotputli, Rajasthan, India, established in 2014
Offers multidisciplinary programs in engineering, pharmacy, business, humanities, and life sciences
Runs under the regulations of the University Grants Commission (UGC) and accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA)
Known for industry‑aligned curriculum, research initiatives, and collaborations with global institutions
